narrative: SNB minutes signal rising inflation risks but no immediate need for action, leaving USD/CHF at 0.8066 as the 375bp Fed-SNB carry remains the primary anchor. NZD leads G10 (+1.49% avg) on hawkish RBNZ bias, while USD/JPY holds at 162.11 despite a 265bp OIS carry advantage as moderate put skew in 25d RR (-1.39) signals hedging demand; gold lower -0.37%; equities +0.38%; DXY +0.06%; VIX 16.0. Watch ECB policy meeting on July 23.
